## Completed
Implemented and committed the Pimote phone bridge for `AskUserQuestion` as `a335b9f`.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts` - added defensive Pimote WebSocket bridge, remote/local race handling, headless remote fallback, answer mapping through `logic.ts`, and cleanup/abort paths.

## How To Verify
`bash extensions/AskUserQuestion/test/logic_test.sh && node --check extensions/AskUserQuestion/index.ts`

## Notes
Verified locally. Existing unrelated dirty `.pi/`/Foreman files remain untouched.
